name: Time To Go
short_description: Guide Angus or Lucy through a maze of tunnels in their search for food. Watch out for bad foods and dodge the obstacles in your path.
detailed_description:
Help Angus or Lucy as they run the tunnels in this fast paced infinite runner. Collecting food along the way gathers points as well as effects your health.

An infinite runner with a twist. 360 degree running surface with random obstacles and collectable items. Running as we all know is hard work so eating the right kind of foods helps.

As time passes the speed gets quicker until you can't handle any more. Eating the right foods along the way will help keep you strong. Watch out for pesky chillies as you traverse the tunnels.
